requests.auth
~~~~~~~~~~~~~
This module contains the authentication handlers for Requests.
	b64encode

Returns a Basic Auth string.z
Non-string usernames will no longer be supported in Requests 3.0.0. Please convert the object you've passed in ({!r}) to a string or bytes object in the near future to avoid problems.)
categoryz
Non-string passwords will no longer be supported in Requests 3.0.0. Please convert the object you've passed in ({!r}) to a string or bytes object in the near future to avoid problems.
